ground_truth.title: The Best Tax Prep Software of 2025
ground_truth.author: Genevieve Carlton, Ph.D.
ground_truth.main_content: The Best Tax Prep Software of 2025. During tax season, millions of Americans look for the best tax software to prepare their individual and business tax returns. TurboTax is the most popular, but which tax software is right for you? The answer depends on your situation. Accountants use different software than individuals, and small business owners have unique tax needs. While tax software may not be a substitute for a certified public accountant (CPA), it's an affordable option for many taxpayers. Our guide breaks down the best tax software programs for accountants, small business owners, and individual taxpayers. Top Tax Software for Accountants: CPAs and tax preparers most often turn to UltraTax CS, Lacerte, and Drake Tax. UltraTax CS ranked as the most used tax preparation software by CPAs, with 22.6% of respondents using it. Lacerte ranked No. 2, garnering top numbers for its overall rating and e-filing ease. Drake Tax held the No. 3 spot and is the clear choice for sole practitioners, with 30% of these accountants using it. Top Tax Software for Small Business Owners: Filing taxes for a small business is often complicated, and owners don't always have the budget to hire a CPA. FreeTaxUSA offers free filing for those with small business income, with a feature to live chat with tax specialists for $8. TurboTax is the big player for small businesses, with more than half using it according to Novo analysis. TaxAct is a more affordable alternative to TurboTax while offering similar features. Top Software for Taxpayers: IRS Direct File is one of the best free tax software options for individuals, now available in 25 states for 2025. H&R Block is the second-most popular tax software and stands out for its variety of filing options including online, in-person, and with live expert help. More than one in three U.S. taxpayers used TurboTax in 2024. FAQ: The most popular tax software is TurboTax, and many taxpayers can use IRS Free File or IRS Direct File to file their income taxes for free. While TurboTax is the most used tax software, the IRS offers several free options for qualifying taxpayers. A CPA can help if you have a complex tax situation or you prefer expert help. CPAs are most likely to use UltraTax CS, based on a 2024 survey.
